revisedPrompt: Create a polished grid-art illustration of a tranquil ornamental pond inspired by classical Chinese and Japanese aesthetics, presented as a cohesive tiled/grid composition. Blend refined East Asian ink-wash composition with high-end animated-film background polish: clean stylized forms, graceful linework, layered depth, soft atmospheric lighting, rich jade, turquoise, coral, and muted gold palette, subtle texture, cinematic detail, and harmonious negative space. The grid structure should be integrated artistically through square tile-like sections and geometric water patterns rather than looking like a UI. No text, no logos, no symbols resembling branding, no watermark, no border.
